intro: The tall grass ahead shakes violently - something rare and skittish is hiding in there, and it has not noticed you yet.
title: Rustling Grass
description: Something rare is rustling in the tall grass. Flush it out for a battle - weaken it and you can throw a Ball to catch it - or leave it hidden.

1.label: Flush it out
1.tooltip: (+) Battle the hidden Pokemon - weaken it, then catch it with a Ball
1.selected: You rush the grass and a startled Pokemon bursts out to fight!

2.label: Leave it hidden
2.selected: You step around the grass and leave whatever it is in peace.
